Adds cache_control markers so the provid: Adds cache_control markers so the provider caches the system prompt for ~5 minutes. Cuts repeated-input token cost by up to 90% and eases rate-limit pressure. Recommended.
OpenAI, Grok, and DeepSeek cache the sys: OpenAI, Grok, and DeepSeek cache the system prompt automatically on the server when prompts exceed their threshold (OpenAI ≥1024 tokens, DeepSeek ≥64 tokens). This toggle is a no-op for these providers but is kept for UI parity.
